goal: Implement format_bytes(num_bytes) in format_bytes.py at the repo root so the write-protected unittest suite under tests/ passes. Do not edit anything under tests/.

items.expectedOutput: format_bytes returns '0 B', '512 B', '1023 B' below 1 KB and '1.0 KB' / '1.0 MB' / '1.0 GB' at the 1024-power unit boundaries
format_bytes formats to one decimal place: 1536 -> '1.5 KB', 2560 -> '2.5 KB', 5242880 -> '5.0 MB'
format_bytes raises ValueError on None, on negative input, and on non-integer input
